meaning: adj.易分裂的,易裂的,分裂性的,可分裂的,裂变的
examples: And this again is the fissile isotope.
The other would end the production of fissile materials for bombs.
With China's help, Pakistan had already been expanding fissile-material production.
Then the Bush administration said it wouldn't accept any verification procedures in any fissile-materials treaty.
Gas centrifuges are used to increase the proportion of fissile uranium-235 atoms within uranium.
